rationale: El Niño continues as a known background risk to energy/food prices; Xi's Pyongyang visit deepens the authoritarian axis relevant to Poland's security environment, but both are continuations with no qualitative new escalation.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's visit deepens the China-Russia-North Korea axis, reinforcing the authoritarian bloc that directly threatens Poland's eastern security environment and NATO posture.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño officially confirmed; indirect risk to global commodity and energy prices affecting Polish cost of living, but already priced into baseline.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: World Bank warning persists; continued risk to energy prices and EU economic stability relevant to Poland, but no new escalation this cycle.
